site.title: SourceCode.Life
site.description: Your life is programmable. Rewrite your source code. Upgrade your life.

hero.subtitle: Rewrite your source code. Upgrade your life.

appVsLife.title: App vs. Life: A Two-Layer Model
appVsLife.description: You don't fix an app at the interface. You fix it in the source code. Life is no different. Just as apps run on operating systems, our behaviors run on deeper life patterns.

fur.title: FUR: The Inner Evolution Model
fur.subtitle: Fix → Upgrade → Run
fur.description: The Chinese term for spiritual practice, "修行", combines "修" (to fix) and "行" (to run) — closely mirroring the process of upgrading software.

quantumReality.title: Reality as Compiled Code
quantumReality.description: Apps are built from binary code. Reality is compiled from quantum code (energy).

footer.tagline: Rewrite your source code. Upgrade your life.
